title: fix: remove fraud detection from seed upgrade
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Trusting the Spores
gist.blurb: We've cleaned up the automated Spore-to-Seed upgrade scripts by removing some redundant checks. Faster processing, same great community.
gist.summary: Removed redundant fraud detection checks from the automated GitHub profile validation script.
gist.impact: The Spore-to-Seed upgrade process is now leaner and more efficient without affecting the quality of automated upgrades.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about removing redundant 'fraud' checks (weeds/security) from the 'seed' upgrade process. Visual symbols: seeds, gardening tools, removing weeds, the bee mascot. Let's use Nomnom eating an old checklist while Polly plants a seed.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a long paper checklist while the cute bee mascot plants a glowing green seed in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a long paper checklist while the cute bee mascot plants a glowing green seed in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot.
